name: Stephen the first Christian martyr stoned in Jerusalem
Our Lady of the Pillar appears to James the Great in Spain
Paul begins missionary journeys with Barnabas
Council of Jerusalem - Gentiles exempt from Mosaic Law
📖 Paul's seven undisputed epistles written (50-58)
Thomas the Apostle arrives in Kerala - founding of Syro-Malabar Catholic Church
Neronian Persecution begins after Great Fire of Rome - Martyrdom of Peter
Martyrdom of Paul outside Rome - Pope Linus succeeds him
Neronian Persecution ends with suicide of Nero
Fall of Jerusalem and destruction of the Temple
📖 Gospel of Mark completed (earliest possible date)
Martyrdom of Thomas the Apostle at Mylapore
Martyrdom of Pope Linus
📖 Gospel of Matthew completed
📖 Gospel of Luke and Acts of the Apostles completed
Persecution of Christians under Emperor Domitian (90-96)
📖 Book of Revelation written
📖 First Epistle of Clement written to the church in Corinth
📖 Gospel of John completed
John the last apostle dies in Ephesus
Ignatius of Antioch coins the term Catholic Church
📖 Latin translations (Vetus Latina) of Scripture circulated
Teachings of Marcion and Valentinus disrupt the Roman community
📖 Justin Martyr composes his First Apology in Rome
Polycarp bishop of Smyrna and disciple of John is martyred
Irenaeus becomes bishop of Lyon France
📖 Irenaeus writes Adversus Haereses against Gnostic teachings
Pope Victor I excommunicates the Quartodecimans in Easter controversy
Tertullian coins Latin terms Trinitas and Sacramentum
📖 Origen writes Contra Celsum
Pope Fabian sends seven bishops from Rome to Gaul
Emperor Decius persecutes Christians - Pope Fabian martyred
Constantine wins Battle of Milvian Bridge under Chi-Rho symbol of Christ
